quotes.text: 冲一冲、稳一稳、保一保。前两个志愿冲梦想，中间稳住，最后两个保底。
quotes.text_en: Reach, match, safety. First two choices reach for your dream, middle ones are steady, last two are safety nets.
quotes.context: 平行志愿填报的经典策略

quotes.text: 服从调剂一定要勾！不勾服从调剂，你就是在拿自己的前途赌博。
quotes.text_en: Always check 'accept adjustment'! Not checking it means you're gambling with your future.
quotes.context: 强调服从调剂的重要性，避免滑档

quotes.text: 填志愿的优先级：城市 > 学校 > 专业。城市决定平台，学校决定起点，专业决定方向。
quotes.text_en: Priority for applications: City > School > Major. City determines platform, school determines starting point, major determines direction.
quotes.context: 志愿填报的优先级排序

quotes.text: 不要浪费你的每一分。多一分能上更好的学校，少一分可能掉一个档次。
quotes.text_en: Don't waste a single point. One more point could get you into a better school; one less could drop you a tier.

quotes.text: 平行志愿不是乱填的。要按分数从高到低排列，第一个冲、最后一个保底，中间阶梯式下降。
quotes.text_en: Parallel preferences aren't filled randomly. Arrange from high to low scores — first one reaches, last one is safety, middle ones descend like a staircase.
quotes.context: 解释平行志愿的正确排序逻辑

quotes.text: 提前批一定要关注！很多人不知道，提前批不影响后面的正常批次，等于白捡一次机会。
quotes.text_en: Pay attention to early admission! Many people don't know it doesn't affect subsequent batches — it's basically a free extra chance.
quotes.context: 提醒考生利用提前批机会

quotes.text: 分数够985但只能去冷门专业，你去不去？去！先进去再说，大不了转专业。
quotes.text_en: Your score qualifies for a 985 but only in an unpopular major — do you go? Yes! Get in first, you can always transfer majors.
quotes.context: 建议先进好学校再想办法转专业

quotes.text: 你在哪个城市上大学，大概率会在那个城市工作。地理锁定效应比你想象的强得多。
quotes.text_en: Where you attend college is likely where you'll work. The geographic lock-in effect is much stronger than you think.
quotes.context: 强调大学所在城市对未来工作地点的锁定

quotes.text: 填志愿是全家的事，不是孩子一个人的事。但最终决定权要给孩子，因为路是他自己走的。
quotes.text_en: Filling out applications is a family matter, not the child's alone. But the final decision should be the child's — they're the ones walking the path.
quotes.context: 平衡家长参与和考生自主权

quotes.text: 看三年的录取数据，不要只看一年的。一年的数据是偶然，三年的数据才是规律。
quotes.text_en: Look at three years of admission data, not just one. One year's data is coincidence; three years reveals the pattern.
quotes.context: 建议参考多年录取数据

quotes.text: 花几千块找专家咨询值不值？如果能帮你避免选错专业浪费四年，那是最划算的投资。
quotes.text_en: Is it worth spending thousands on expert consultation? If it helps you avoid choosing the wrong major and wasting four years, it's the best investment you'll make.
quotes.context: 为专业志愿咨询服务正名

quotes.text: 志愿填报不是高考出分后才开始的。高二就应该开始了解专业、了解学校、了解政策。
quotes.text_en: Application planning doesn't start after scores come out. You should begin understanding majors, schools, and policies in your second year of high school.
quotes.context: 强调提前准备志愿填报的重要性

quotes.text: 分数在一本线上下的考生最纠结。我的建议是：宁可去好的二本王牌专业，也不要去差的一本混日子。
quotes.text_en: Students scoring around the first-tier cutoff are the most conflicted. My advice: better to attend a good second-tier school's flagship program than drift through a bad first-tier school.
quotes.context: 给一本线边缘考生的建议
